info.name: Harper
info.description: The Harper background from Forgotten Realms: Heroes of Faerûn.
info.author: Wizards of the Coast

ul.li: Skill Proficiencies: Performance and Sleight of Hand
Equipment: Choose A or B: (A) Disguise Kit, Bedroll, Costume, Grappling Hook, Rope, Traveler’s Clothes, 14 GP; or (B) 50 GP

description.p: You accepted an invitation to join the Harpers, pledging an oath to uphold the Harper code and act in service to the common good. Like all Harpers, you understand the value of teamwork as well as when it’s best to go it alone. Harper veterans have taught you the order’s secrets—magical melodies, special watchwords, and legerdemain—and have entrusted you to use such knowledge to surveil and undermine the forces of evil.
Trinket. Roll on the Harper Trinkets table to determine what trinket you have from your time with the Harpers.

tr.td: A powder compact with a hidden compartment
A trick coin that’s heads on both sides
A scroll of sheet music for an unknown instrument

setters.set: Dexterity, Intelligence, Charisma, Harper Agent Feat, Performance and Sleight of Hand Skills, and Disguise Kit

select.name: Harper Trinkets
select.item: A powder compact with a hidden compartment
A trick coin that’s heads on both sides
A scroll of sheet music for an unknown instrument
